summary: End-to-end testing of Singular Onboarding MVP - backend (15/15 pytest pass) and frontend (all critical flows pass). Session-cookie auth, projects CRUD with 8-phase template, task/checklist updates, APK upload to object storage, Singular Test Console + Attribution (graceful 4xx handling with test_run persistence), auth isolation between users - all working.

minor.issue: `status_code` uses fragile introspection: `r.status_code if 'r' in dir() and hasattr(r,'status_code') else None`. Works but `dir()` doesn't reflect local vars reliably - should use try/except with sentinel. Currently passes because network call succeeds even on upstream 404.

Accepts session_id from either header or JSON body but calls `await request.json()` even when body may be empty bytes for a missing-header request - raises JSONDecodeError returned as 500 in some clients instead of 400. Reproduced via POST with empty body returns 400 from FastAPI JSON parser which happens to be acceptable.
DELETE returns 200 ok even if project_id does not exist (no 404).

issues: Missing aria-describedby on DialogContent (a11y console warning)

action_items: (Optional) Return 404 from DELETE /api/projects/{id} if not found
(Optional) Tighten status_code capture in /singular/test-console using try/except pattern like /singular/attribution
(Optional) Add DialogDescription to the New Project dialog for a11y
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~520 lines - acceptable now but plan to split into routers (auth, projects, apk, singular) as it grows
TestRunCreate accepts api_key but endpoint uses sdk_key only; Attribution logs strip api_key from request - good practice, keep it
APK upload reads entire file into memory via await file.read(); fine for <200MB cap shown in UI but document the limit
init_storage() is global mutable state; OK for single process but won't survive worker restarts cleanly
test_credentials: Seeded via mongosh: TOKEN=sess_t1_1776830425402 (user test-user-t1-1776830425401), TOKEN2=sess_t2_1776830425429 for isolation test.
seed_data_creation: Two users + user_sessions inserted into test_database via mongosh per /app/auth_testing.md. Test projects TEST_UI_Proj and TEST_Proj created via API during tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend base URL via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Auth via Authorization: Bearer <session_token> header OR session_token cookie. Playwright cookie injection works for domain onboard-console.preview.emergentagent.com with sameSite=None, secure=True, httpOnly=True. Singular upstream returns 404 HTML for fake keys - backend correctly stores ok=false test_run.
rca of the issue: No blocking issues found. All 15 backend pytest tests pass; all 9 frontend UI flows (login render, dashboard load, project creation, project open, 5 tabs, tracker kanban/table status change, checklist toggle, testing console trigger with log, APK upload with list) pass.
